goal_summary: Implement a performance and feature-focused mobile UI/UX redesign to address user complaints on speed, stability, review flow, and rewards clarity. Adopt a 5-tab bottom navigation.
performance_requirements: Eliminate all reported UI lag, especially in the main feed (smooth scrolling for image/video content).
Ensure app stability; prevent crashes during photo/video review submission.
Optimize all loading states to be fast and user-friendly.

tabs.name: Home
tabs.content_focus: New Product Sampling Campaigns, personalized recommendations, community feed.
tabs.enhancement: Display a prominent, dynamic 'Point Progress' banner (e.g., 'X points until next tier/reward').

tabs.name: Scan / Search
tabs.content_focus: Instant product lookup via text or barcode.
tabs.enhancement: Improve Barcode Scanner accuracy and speed. Implement a streamlined 'Product Not Found' workflow for users to easily submit new product data and be the first reviewer.

tabs.name: Review (Create)
tabs.enhancement: Implement a multi-step, guided form (not a single text box). Required fields should include: Star Rating Breakdown (Value, Texture, Effectiveness), Skin Type selection, and a highly stable, fast flow for uploading Video/Photo Proof.

tabs.name: Rewards Hub
tabs.content_focus: User loyalty status and rewards management.
tabs.enhancement: CREATE A DEDICATED HUB. Clearly show: Current Points, Next Milestone/Reward Goal. Crucially, add a **'My Free Products'** section with status tracking (Eligible, Awaiting Shipment, Review Due). Include a prominent, bug-free section to **confirm/edit the shipping address**.

tabs.name: Profile / Me
tabs.enhancement: Ensure easy access to 'Review History', 'Redeemed Rewards Log', and the 'About Me' profile for updating campaign-targeting details.

key_actions.requirement: The redemption checkout must clearly state the **estimated fulfillment/delivery time** (e.g., 'Voucher delivery: 3-5 days') *before* the user confirms the transaction.
A clear, working button for **one-click application** to a sampling campaign, with instant feedback on eligibility/submission success.

developer_notes: Focus on mobile-first design and modern component libraries for the best performance.
The primary goal is to address existing user frustration with the app's speed and lack of transparency regarding rewards/shipping.
